description: Style Noteindigo nation brings casual style to your wardrobe with this fashionable shirt. The fabric will keep you fresh and comfortable all day, the short sleeves sit snug on your well toned arms. Pair it with jeans corduroys and suede shoes for a relaxed, casual lookProduct DetailsNavy blue shirt for men, has short sleeves with a flap and a press button over the cuffs, full buttoned placket, pocket on the left chest and a mock press button on the pocketMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitIndigo Nation Edgy FitThe model (height:6' and shoulders:18") is wearing a size M
